ops.text: Phase 1 continual collection DONE. New: cc_steer/hooks.py (idempotent user-level SessionEnd async 'cc-steer scan --no-sync' merge, capt-hook conventions), cc_steer/pipeline.py (budgeted scan->triage->refine->enrich->export, weekly adds audit+eval, per-stage failure isolation, push-failure downgrades to local export), cc_steer/journal.py (cc-notes wrapper, degrades gracefully), cc_steer/launchd.py (com.cc-steer.pipeline agent, sh -lc with ccp env guard, uvx resolved at install). CLI: hooks install/uninstall/status + pipeline run/install-launchd/uninstall-launchd. Installed live with dev prefix (PyPI 0.10.0 lacks pipeline cmd): hook in ~/.claude/settings.json, agent loaded nightly 03:00 --auto-weekly, journal-repo wired. Smoke run: scan 407 files +52 rows (today's sessions), triage 5 (47 pending for tonight), refine 2->3 pairs, enrich 0 corrections (converged), local export traces 4421. Pipeline journal log 755c9e1 recording. 215 pytest + ty clean (macOS; Linux gate before push). Note: pool acct projects dirs symlink to ~/.claude/projects so default discovery catches all sessions.
